G1.seed_note: OpenAI seed parameter is best-effort only; determinism is not guaranteed. Reported as-is in the paper.

G2.note: Second generator family, added to address the reviewer note that results only held for one generator (gpt-4o-mini). Deliberately NOT claude-haiku-4-5 (the judge's model) to avoid a generator=judge self-preference confound. is_primary=false: G1 stays the paper's primary/pre-registered generator; G2 is the replication check.

verifier.note: Deliberately different provider+model from judge (was claude-haiku-4-5, same as judge) to remove the verifier=judge confound flagged in Phan_bien_Q4_Persona_Consistency.md section 8: correlated accept/revise/reject and scoring decisions from one model could inflate C3/C4 scores.

judge.note: Judge stays fixed across both generators (G1 and G2) so all responses are scored on one consistent rubric-applier; only the generator varies.
